mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_feed.feed_rebuild_task SET task_status = 'RUNNING', updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE bluenote_feed.feed_rebuild_task SET task_status = 'SUCCESS', progress_json = #{progressJson}, last_error = NULL, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE bluenote_feed.feed_rebuild_task SET task_status = 'FAILED', progress_json = #{progressJson}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
